mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(B.NAME, S.RESOURCE_ID) resourceName, S.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, S.TACHE tache, S.SAME_PERIOD_INPUT samePeriodInput, S.SAME_PERIOD_OUTPUT samePeriodOutput, S.SAME_PERIOD_ERROR samePeriodError, S.CHAIN_RATIO_ONE chainRatioOne, S.CHAIN_RATIO_TWO chainRatioTwo, S.CHAIN_RATIO_ERROR chainRatioError, S.DATA_TIME dataTime, S.ALARM_TYPE alarmType FROM DAC_BILL_ALARM_STATISTICS S LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT SJXJBM, NAME FROM CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE) B ON S.RESOURCE_ID = B.SJXJBM where 1=1
and S.TACHE = #{tache}
and NVL(B.NAME, S.RESOURCE_ID) like '%'||#{dataName}||'%'
and S.DATA_TIME >= to_timestamp(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and S.DATA_TIME <= to_timestamp(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
order by S.CREATE_TIME desc,S.DATA_TIME DESC,S.TACHE,S.RESOURCE_ID
SELECT ID id, NAME name, PHONE_NUMBER phoneNumber, ALARM_TYPE alarmType, CREATE_TIME createTime FROM ALARM_PHONENUMBER where 1=1 order by CREATE_TIME desc

SELECT ID id,NAME name,PHONE_NUMBER phoneNumber,ALARM_TYPE alarmType,CREATE_TIME createTime FROM ALARM_PHONENUMBER where 1=1
and ID = #{id}
